title: fix: invalidate stale api key data after updates
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh keys, no waiting
gist.blurb: Fixed a pesky caching bug where edited API keys would sometimes show old data. Now when you update a key, the changes show up instantly.
gist.summary: Resolved an issue where API key updates returned stale data by implementing proper cache invalidation and no-store headers.
gist.impact: Users will now see their API key changes reflected immediately in the dashboard without needing to hard refresh.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old, dusty data (representing the stale cache) while Polly the bee holds up a shiny, freshly minted API key.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating dusty old paper documents, while the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt holds up a shiny new golden key. A retro terminal nearby glows lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
